reviews.author: Raja Raman
reviews.review_body: Awesome CBSE school with lot of activities for kids. Teachers, coordinators and Principal are extremely friendly and cooperative. Happy with my kids progress.

reviews.author: Hardik Sai
reviews.review_body:
Excellent school in the vicinity for my Kid.
Very affordable fees for the facility they are providing, the faculty are very knowledgeable and good at academics.

reviews.author: Balu S REDDY
reviews.review_body: Very good infrastructure and management, but I heard about Hitler rules i never seen physically, now seeing directly from the surana principal, wrost behavior he won't give chance to speak parents, what he says thats the rule. No good schools nearby so they are getting lots of admissions due to that they are sitting in the sky. My dear principal change your attitude and recrute qualified & experience teachers.

reviews.author: Deepa Anjali
reviews.review_body:
The educational system followed in the scool is really good.  Kids are happy studying here.  Every subject is explained  giving good examples and showing practically.

Kids are encouraged to participate in extracurricular activities like,  music, dance, sports, yoga etc.  They make sure all the kids get equal opportunity in everything.

Infrastructure of the school is also good.  So overall experience with this school is excellent.

reviews.author: Nishin Goyal
reviews.review_body: Infrastructure wise it is a one of best school in Bangalore, and school fees in also affordable for the middle class. syllabus is good, in the syllabus they have covered almost all the activities (dance, drama, music, skating etc.) along with academics. But it is not sufficient, they should work on the child development, The small kids needs a lots of personal care, whatever they learn from the school environment impacts on their personal atiquete and attitude. Students fight, comments each other and make complaints. They need to stop and taught immediately with personal attention of every child, Teaching methodology also needs improvement to increase the child interest.
